add_compile_options(-w)

if(NOT BUILD_STATIC_LIB)
    # When building shared libraries, ensure position independent code
    set(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)
endif()

add_subdirectory(libfort)
add_subdirectory(fft)
add_subdirectory(flute3)
add_subdirectory(pybind11)
add_subdirectory(abseil-cpp)
add_subdirectory(lefdef)
add_subdirectory(salt)
add_subdirectory(lemon)
add_subdirectory(yaml-cpp)

function(ieda_add_highs)
    set(FAST_BUILD ON)
    set(BUILD_CXX ON)
    set(BUILD_CXX_EXE OFF)
    set(BUILD_TESTING OFF)
    set(BUILD_EXAMPLES OFF)
    set(BUILD_CXX_EXAMPLE OFF)
    set(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS OFF)
    set(FORTRAN OFF)
    set(CSHARP OFF)
    set(PYTHON_BUILD_SETUP OFF)
    set(ZLIB OFF)
    set(CUPDLP_GPU OFF)
    set(CUPDLP_FIND_CUDA OFF)
    set(HIGHS_NO_DEFAULT_THREADS ON)
    add_subdirectory(highs EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)
endfunction()

ieda_add_highs()

set(GDSTK_BUILD_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
add_subdirectory(gdstk)
# add_subdirectory(mt-kahypar)
